generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX) providing 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth Camera (Intel Deepsense D435i) capturing stereo depth information for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors monitoring the ego vehicle's real-time speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance ProcessedLiDARClusters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point clouds clustered using DBSCAN for object detection/tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance KalmanFilteredObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated via Kalman filtering from processed LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedLiDARClusters
]

instance RawDepthImages : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw stereo depth images from Intel Deepsense D435i camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageData
]

instance StereoDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed stereo depth information for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageData
]

instance RealTimeSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time speed metrics captured from onboard vehicle sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance RealTimeSteeringData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data from onboard vehicle sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance EgoVehicleState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combination of real-time speed and steering angle data representing the ego vehicle's state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeSpeedData
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for vehicle propulsion system"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages steering angle adjustments via vehicle servo actuators"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command triggered via User Entity's Control Panel"
]

// C3: Models
instance LiDARProcessingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for LiDAR point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implemented as Controlling Feature Element adhering to ISO 15622 standards for performance-class I ACC"
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendering ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

// C4: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-component communication, enabling modularity and loose coupling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EdgeProcessingFE
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems modeling (e.g., point cloud clustering)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARProcessingModel
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Feature Element implementing Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking via ROS2 middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARProcessingModel
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Element collecting raw sensor data via ROS2 middleware"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Feature Element serializing, aligning, and converting data formats (ISO 23247)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance EdgeProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Edge processing unit handling computation offloading to NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudEdgeProcessing
]

instance CloudEdgeProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation to NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano or cloud infrastructure for scalability"
    DTDFVocab:enables EdgeProcessingFE
]

// C5: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego-vehicle speed, steering angle, detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from vehicle ECUs to edge/cloud processing (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationEfficiencyAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight
]

// C6: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and environmental perception for monitoring"
]

instance ComputationEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads computationally intensive ACC processing to edge/cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC functionality and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting and analysis"
]

// C7: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwinSystem, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle with layered architecture including LiDAR, depth camera, and state sensors"
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized system for real-time monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading for ACC"
    base:contains DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE, ACCControlLogic, VisualizationModel
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for monitoring, remote control, and report generation"
    base:contains ControlPanelUI, VisualizationInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **ACC Control FE**: Computes desired speed based on detected lead vehicles and distance, then sends actuation commands to the vehicle’s motor and steering systems via ROS2.
  - **Emergency Braking Command**: Sent from the User Entity’s Control Panel to the Physical Twin Entity’s Actuation FE, triggering immediate braking to halt the vehicle.
  - **Remote Management Commands**: Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or send emergency braking commands via Wi-Fi (UDP-based) to the PT, ensuring low-latency (<100 ms) response for safety-critical operations.
  The system follows ISO 15622 for ACC compliance, with actuation executed on the vehicle’s ECUs (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) via ROS2 nodes."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DTS operates on a **real-time time scale** with the following synchronization requirements:
  - **Data Collection and Processing**: Object tracking and ego-vehicle state updates occur at **high frequency** (implied by real-time perception cycles), with latency constraints enforced by the 3GPP V2V specification (≤100 ms end-to-end).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices (PT and DT) are synchronized to an accuracy of **≤100 ms** to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems, though stricter standards (e.g., <1 ms) are mandated for safety-critical vehicular applications in other contexts.
  - **Service Latency**: Virtual-to-physical interactions (e.g., ACC commands) must respond within **≤100 ms** to meet ISO 15622 performance requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DTS constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (ISO 23247 reference architecture), with the following components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor data processing (Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, Data Pre-Processing FE) and actuation (Actuation FE) on the vehicle’s hardware (NVIDIA Jetson).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (Data Collecting FE), reporting (Reporting FE), and visualization (Presentation FE) via ROS2 nodes.
  - **User Entity**: Provides 3D Visualization (User Interface FE) and Control Panel (User Interface FE) for remote management and monitoring.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements Data Translation FE for inter-entity communication (ROS2 for intra-entity, Wi-Fi for inter-entity via UDP).
  The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) to encapsulate automotive-specific resources (sensors, actuators)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DTS spans the following lifecycle stages:
  1. **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC development and validation, leveraging 3D CAD and ROS2 for simulation and testing.
  2. **Operational Phase**: Deployed for real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance of the autonomous vehicle’s ACC system during operation.
  3. **Data Collection Phase**: Captures operational data for post-mortem analysis, performance optimization, and decision-making (e.g., fuel economy, driving behavior). The DTS covers the **as-operated** representation phase of the physical twin, with minimal idealized design assumptions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**: Ensured via ROS2’s lifecycle management and custom FE implementations (e.g., Kalman filter for object tracking).
  - **Validation**: Tested against ISO 15622 for ACC performance-class I compliance, with real-time latency (<100 ms) validated via 3GPP 22.185.
  - **Uncertainty**: LiDAR point cloud noise and sensor calibration errors are mitigated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering.
  - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (±100 ms) and Data Translation FE ensure consistent data streams between entities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: Wi-Fi network for remote management between the User Entity and Physical Twin Entity.
  - **Intra-Entity Communication**: ROS2 network for data exchange within the Digital Twin system (e.g., Data Translation FE).
  - **Standardized Protocols**: Data serialization/alignment via ISO 23247 Data Translation FE (optionally using OPC UA per standard guidelines)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DTS is deployed as a **hybrid system**:
  - **Onboard Components**: ROS2 nodes on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (Physical Twin Entity) for real-time processing.
  - **Cloud/Edge Components**: Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted on external devices (e.g., cloud servers) for scalability and remote management.
  - **Data Storage**: SQL databases (implied) store historical data externally to the vehicle for reporting and analysis."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system does not integrate with external information systems beyond its primary functionality. The case study focuses on a single 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle, with no mention of fleet coordination or inter-vehicle communication (e.g., V2V)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DTS adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for Digital Twin Manufacturing (adapted for automotive DTs, with deviations like the Physical Twin Entity).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control performance requirements (Sections 6.1–6.2 for performance-class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (<100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware and inter-component communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include:
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**, ensuring operator oversight during remote management.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency must be ≤100 ms to prevent unsafe delays in ACC control or emergency braking.
  - **Synchronization**: Clock accuracy of ≤100 ms ensures event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems.
  - **Cybersecurity**: Not addressed in the document; the focus is on safety/reliability (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance)."
]
